channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Cole Allen Charged with Attempted Assassination of President Trump at WHCA Dinner
item.description: Federal prosecutors have charged Cole Allen, a 31-year-old resident of Torrance, California, with attempting to assassinate President Donald Trump during the White House Correspondents' Association (W...

item.title: Parliamentary scrutiny threatens Starmer's leadership amid party tensions
item.description: Sir Keir Starmer, the Prime Minister, faces a pivotal day in Parliament that could severely undermine his position as leader of the Labour Party. Recent reports indicate mounting pressure on Starmer d...

item.title: Complaint raised over potential bias on Alberta government referendum website
item.description: A pro-immigration group in Alberta has filed a complaint with Elections Alberta, claiming that the province’s new referendum website presents information in a way that favours a 'yes' vote, potentiall...

item.title: John Aloisi leads Chengdu Rongcheng to top of Chinese Super League with dynamic football
item.description: John Aloisi has rapidly become a celebrated figure in Chengdu, Sichuan, after taking the reins at Chengdu Rongcheng in the Chinese Super League. Just months into the season, his team sits at the top o...

item.title: Deputy Governor Hamzat Appreciates Sanwo-Olu’s Endorsement For 2027 Lagos Governorship
item.description: The Deputy Governor of Lagos State, Obafemi Hamzat, don express him happiness after Governor Babajide Sanwo-Olu officially endorse am to be the next governor come 2027. According to statement wey Hamz...

item.title: Trump Administration Pays Energy Companies to Abandon Offshore Wind Projects in California and New Jersey
item.description: The Trump administration has agreed to pay $885 million to two energy companies, Bluepoint Wind and Golden State Wind, to cancel their offshore wind projects. Golden State Wind had a project off Morro...

item.title: Motorcycle rider dies in Ortigas Flyover accident involving two trucks
item.description: A tragic accident occurred on the Ortigas Flyover, resulting in the death of a female motorcycle rider. According to reports, the rider was caught between two trucks, which led to fatal injuries. The ...

item.title: Trump and King Charles engage in private exchange during White House visit
item.description: During King Charles and Queen Camilla's visit to the White House, President Donald Trump and the monarch shared a brief, private exchange, observed by a lip reader. The encounter took place on the Sou...

item.title: Israel Expands Control in Gaza Beyond Ceasefire Boundaries
item.description: Since the ceasefire agreement in October 2025, Israel has gradually extended its control over Gaza by moving the so-called 'yellow line,' the ceasefire demarcation, westward. Originally controlling ab...

item.title: How AI-generated poetry affects our emotional connection to literature
item.description: A recent study explored how students respond emotionally to AI-generated poetry, specifically examining works in the style of Emily Dickinson. Researchers used GPT4o to extend Dickinson's public domai...

item.title: How Idris Elba Built a $50 Million Career Across Acting, Music, and Business
item.description: Idris Elba, born in Hackney, London in 1972, has grown into one of the most versatile entertainers globally, with a net worth of about $50 million as of 2026. His journey began with early roles in Bri...

item.title: China's Zero Tariff Policy Opens New Trade Avenues for South Africa
item.description: China's decision to grant 100% tariff-free access to products from 53 African nations, including South Africa, is set to significantly boost economic cooperation between the two countries. The policy,...

item.title: Understanding Nervous System Stress and How to Manage It
item.description: Many people use phrases like 'nervous system overload' or 'dysregulated nervous system' to describe periods of heightened stress, often inspired by social media or wellness trends. The autonomic nervo...

item.title: Michael Jackson biopic achieves record-breaking box office despite critical controversy
item.description: The Michael Jackson biopic, titled 'Michael', has opened to remarkable success, grossing $97 million domestically and $217 million worldwide during its first weekend, setting a new benchmark for music...

item.title: Baby Auckland Laid to Rest After Being Found Beneath Floorboards
item.description: Nearly two years after the skeletal remains of a baby were discovered under floorboards during a house renovation in Bishop Auckland, the child has been given a proper burial. Found in July 2024, the ...

item.title: King Charles III Addresses US Congress in Effort to Strengthen UK-US Ties Amid Tensions with Trump
item.description: In a historic speech delivered to the US Congress, King Charles III sought to reaffirm the long-standing 'special relationship' between the United Kingdom and the United States. The King, addressing p...

item.title: Carney criticizes U.S. tariff deals, urges caution for Canada
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney spoke with CBC regarding recent U.S. tariff-relief agreements, stating that many countries hastily entered deals that ultimately offered little benefit. Carney highlighted t...

item.title: Kenyan Truck Driver in US Detained, Family Seeks Support for Bail

item.title: Senate Probes Kisumu Municipal Board Dysfunction Due to County Control
item.description: The Senate Standing Committee on Devolution and Intergovernmental Relations is having a serious look at what’s going on with municipal boards all over Kenya. It all started with some major complaints ...

item.title: Lafey Constituency: Ahmed Hilal Announces Bid for Parliamentary Seat
